prompt: A soft, cute oil pastel portrait illustration of a young woman sitting indoors, drawn in a handmade crayon-like style with visible waxy strokes, rough sketch lines, and lightly textured paper. She is shown from about the thighs up in a slightly forward-leaning seated pose, one elbow resting on her knee and one hand supporting her cheek, creating a casual candid feeling. Give her medium chestnut brown shoulder-length hair with a center part and softly flipped ends, with loose strands framing the face. Dress her in a chunky ribbed knit sweater in muted gray, paired with a high-waisted skirt in warm beige. Add 2 pieces of jewelry: one dangling earring visible on the right side and one delicate necklace with a small pendant. Add 1 small crossbody bag with a thin strap running diagonally across the torso and the pouch resting near the waist. Use a warm neutral palette of cream, beige, gray, brown, and soft charcoal, with gentle ochre highlights. Keep the facial features minimal and softly suggested in the same pastel style, with a sweet, cozy, very cute mood. The background should be a simple off-white interior with 1 broad horizontal gray band behind the subject suggesting a bench or wall accent, plus loose beige and gray scribbled shading on the floor and wall. Emphasize the charm of an oil pastel drawing: imperfect edges, layered pigment, dry-brush crayon texture, and an airy sketchbook aesthetic.
